# Pull Request

## Description
What does this change do, and why?

## Linked issues
Closes #...

## Type of change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore
- [ ] security

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] Red-team scenario added (if security-relevant)
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint type` passes locally

## Security review
- [ ] No new secrets, credentials, or tokens are introduced.
- [ ] Inputs from untrusted sources are validated and sanitized.
- [ ] New dependencies are justified, pinned, and scanned.
- [ ] Threat model in `docs/THREAT-MODEL.md` updated if surface changed.

## Documentation
- [ ] `README.md`, `docs/`, and inline docstrings updated.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`.

## Breaking changes
- [ ] None
- [ ] Yes — described in the changelog and migration notes.

## Checklist
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] CI is green.
